title: Canonical Capability Graph Consolidation Pack
subject: normalize Batch 1–96 into a governed capability ontology, dependency graph, conflict model, compatibility matrix, and conservative graph certification gate
global_id_policy: unassigned-to-avoid-collision-with-existing-batch81-96; use scripts/remap_global_ids.py after resolving the installed global range

skills.name: b97-legacy-skill-estate-inventory
skills.title: Legacy Skill Estate Inventory
skills.purpose: Inventory every installed Skill, schema, tool, runtime, route, policy, test and evidence asset from Batch 1–96 without treating filenames as authoritative identity.

skills.name: b97-capability-ontology-foundation
skills.title: Capability Ontology Foundation
skills.purpose: Define the canonical ELMOS capability vocabulary, hierarchy, boundaries and relation types used by every product line.

skills.name: b97-skill-metadata-normalizer
skills.title: Skill Metadata Normalizer
skills.purpose: Normalize heterogeneous Skill metadata into one versioned machine-readable representation while preserving source identity and uncertainty.

skills.name: b97-capability-node-builder
skills.title: Capability Node Builder
skills.purpose: Build typed capability, Skill, tool, runtime, artifact, test, evidence and policy nodes from the normalized estate.

skills.name: b97-dependency-edge-resolver
skills.title: Dependency Edge Resolver
skills.purpose: Resolve explicit and inferred dependencies with confidence, evidence, direction and blocking semantics.

skills.name: b97-conflict-overlap-detector
skills.title: Conflict and Overlap Detector
skills.purpose: Detect duplicate, overlapping, contradictory and mutually exclusive Skills or policies before runtime selection.

skills.name: b97-lifecycle-deprecation-model
skills.title: Lifecycle and Deprecation Model
skills.purpose: Implement proposed, experimental, supported, deprecated, retired and blocked lifecycle states with transition controls.

skills.name: b97-version-compatibility-matrix
skills.title: Version Compatibility Matrix
skills.purpose: Model ELMOS Core, Skill, contract, toolchain, route and domain-pack compatibility using exact ranges and evidence.

skills.name: b97-ownership-governance-registry
skills.title: Ownership and Governance Registry
skills.purpose: Assign accountable owners, reviewers, security contacts and change authorities to every governed asset.

skills.name: b97-evidence-requirement-graph
skills.title: Evidence Requirement Graph
skills.purpose: Link capabilities and Skills to the exact evidence types, freshness windows and independent approvals required for each verification state.

skills.name: b97-tool-runtime-requirement-graph
skills.title: Tool and Runtime Requirement Graph
skills.purpose: Map Skills to exact compilers, SDKs, services, runner profiles, licenses, devices and cloud capabilities.

skills.name: b97-route-domain-pack-composer
skills.title: Route and Domain Pack Composer
skills.purpose: Compose reusable core primitives, route packs and domain policies without duplicating implementation logic.

skills.name: b97-capability-graph-query-api
skills.title: Capability Graph Query API
skills.purpose: Expose bounded, tenant-safe graph queries for discovery, dependency closure, impact analysis and execution planning.

skills.name: b97-legacy-estate-migration-planner
skills.title: Legacy Estate Migration Planner
skills.purpose: Plan non-destructive migration from Batch 1–96 manifests into the canonical graph with rollback and reconciliation.

skills.name: b97-graph-change-impact-analyzer
skills.title: Graph Change Impact Analyzer
skills.purpose: Calculate downstream compatibility, route, policy, evidence and certification impact for every graph change.

skills.name: b97-capability-graph-certification-gate
skills.title: Capability Graph Certification Gate
skills.purpose: Certify the canonical graph only when inventory, ontology, identity, dependencies, conflicts, ownership, compatibility and evidence requirements are complete.
